# Better Auth Agent Skills

Selected reference skills from `better-auth/skills`.

These are vendored for consultation by coding agents. They do not override this repo's `AGENTS.md`, `CONTEXT.md`, `docs/agents/codex-workflows.md`, or `docs/agents/coding-standards.md`.

Included skills:

- `better-auth/best-practices`
- `better-auth/create-auth`
- `better-auth/emailAndPassword`
- `security`

Excluded for now:

- `better-auth/organization`: this repo deliberately models `Academia` in the app domain and does not use Better Auth organizations in v1.
- `better-auth/twoFactor`: out of scope for the current access slice.
